/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/candy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/graphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/NFont/NFont.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/NFont/SDL_FontCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/image_png.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/keyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/mouse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/sound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/sprites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/stb_vorbis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/private/sdl_wrapper/video.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2_project.dir/test/test.cpp.o -o p2_project   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.8.8/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_mixer/2.8.1_1/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib
